languages.text: "Эоганн, что за эксперимент ты собрался проводить с этими людьми?"
"Eogunn, what manner of experiment do you plan to conduct on these men?"
languages.original_text: "Эоганн, что за эксперимент ты собрался проводить с этими людьми?"

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, what manner of experiment do you plan to conduct on these men?"
"Eogunn, what manner of experiment do you plan to conduct on these men?"
"Eogunn, what manner of experiment do you plan to conduct on these men?"

languages.text: 「エオガン、この男たちに対して、どのような実験を行うつもりなの？」
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, what manner of experiment do you plan to conduct on these men?"

traits.locale_text: 「エオグン、この男たちに対して、どのような実験を行うつもりなの？」

languages.text: “伊奥贡，你究竟打算在这些人身上做什么实验？”
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, what manner of experiment do you plan to conduct on these men?"

traits.locale_text: “伊奥贡，你究竟打算在这些人身上做什么实验？”

languages.text: «Eogunn, ¿qué clase de experimento piensa realizar con estos hombres?».
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, what manner of experiment do you plan to conduct on these men?"

traits.locale_text: «Eogunn, ¿qué clase de experimento piensa realizar con estos hombres?».

languages.text: "Eogunn, welche Art von Experimenten wollt Ihr mit diesen Männern anstellen?"
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, what manner of experiment do you plan to conduct on these men?"

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, welche Art von Experimenten wollt Ihr mit diesen Männern anstellen?"

languages.text: « Eogunn, quel genre d'expérience comptez-vous mener sur ces hommes ? »
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, what manner of experiment do you plan to conduct on these men?"

traits.locale_text: « Eogunn, quel genre d'expérience comptez-vous mener sur ces hommes ? »

languages.text: "Eogunn, bu adamlar üzerinde ne tür bir deney yapacaksınız?"
languages.original_text: "Eogunn, what manner of experiment do you plan to conduct on these men?"

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn, bu adamlar üzerinde ne tür bir deney yapacaksınız?"
